# RuntimeInfrastructure

Complete runtime infrastructure monadic execution pipeline 
 ( StorageProgram , interpreter , effects ) , storage and transport 
 adapters ( in-memory , SQL , cloud , HTTP , WebSocket , serverless ) , 
 and application-level infrastructure primitives ( cache , plugin 
 registry , event bus ) . The layer between concept handlers and 
 the physical world .
